title: An Ordinance Adopting Executive Order No. 217 Series of 2020, Dated November 5, 2020 Entitled ? an Order Prescribing the Guidelines for the Disposal of the Body or Remains of a Dead Person and the Conduct of Funeral Wake or Funeral Vigil in the Municipality of Los Baños, Laguna? and Effectively Repealing Ordinance No. 2020-2016.
